summary: FPV drones destroyed two Russian soldiers on motorcycles during an assault on Ukrainian positions, while another Russian soldier who faked surrender was killed by FPV drones after attempting to flee. In Krasny Liman, an FAB-3000 bomb with UMPK guidance was dropped on a Ukrainian UAV launch site, and the Elka anti-aircraft drone performed a kinetic intercept of a Ukrainian strike UAV at 1,300 meters, detonating its warhead. The Rubicon Center reported 116 targets destroyed on April 6, 2026, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and manpower, while ZALA Z-16 reconnaissance UAVs with integrated AI are reducing target-to-strike time to seconds.
